subtitle.en: an electron leaps between metal and ligand orbitals — direction depends on which side has the lower-energy LUMO; the intense colours of permanganate, Prussian blue, and Ru-bipyridyl all come from CT
subtitle.ko: 전자가 금속과 리간드 오비탈 사이를 점프 — 방향은 어느 쪽 LUMO가 더 낮은가에 따라; KMnO₄, 프러시안 블루, [Ru(bipy)₃]²⁺ 모두 CT 색

description.en: MO diagram with M and L levels. Toggle LMCT/MLCT to flip the arrow direction; example compounds (KMnO₄, [CrO₄]²⁻ for LMCT; Ru(bipy)₃ for MLCT) with measured λ_max and complement colour swatches.
description.ko: M과 L 레벨이 있는 MO 다이어그램. LMCT/MLCT 토글로 화살표 방향 전환; 예시 화합물(KMnO₄, [CrO₄]²⁻; Ru(bipy)₃) 측정 λ_max + 보색 swatch.
